summary: Reviews focus on a misdated entry; no comments on sound or performance quality
review: Both reviewers flag an incorrect year tag—originally listed as 1987 but actually from 1978. Aside from the metadata correction, there are no observations about the recording fidelity or musical execution of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews, one giving a 5‑star rating and another effectively a zero due to the date error; no substantive performance or audio information is provided.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.
